unified_frame_statement: The women's circle shares their collective journey with Coach Amara, showing how group vulnerability helped them overcome isolation shame and build authentic sisterhood.

state_alpha.internal_monologue: "I thought I was the only one falling apart."
state_alpha.sensory_anchor: The forced smile that hurt their cheeks at social events

the_abyss.realization: "When she spoke my secret out loud, I realized I wasn't broken—I was human."

the_spark.insight_quote: "Every woman nodded. They knew. We all knew. And suddenly I wasn't alone." (22:15)

state_omega.action: Weekly circle attendance and vulnerability practice
state_omega.result: Loneliness score from 9/10 to 2/10 over 12 weeks

sensory_anchors: The weight of the mask they wore to brunch before
The tears that flowed freely during the first share
The warmth of the group hug at every closing now
